results.title: Our Team
results.content:
We tackle challenges with creativity, integrity, and a willingness to collaborate. We believe that aging is not only the greatest risk factor for all major chronic conditions, but that aging research represents the most significant opportunity to improve human health today. It is our responsibility to share the benefits of aging research with as many people as possible, to effect real and meaningful change. This includes our colleagues, our families, and our friends—who were the original inspiration for Elysium.

We are solving some of the world’s most interesting and important problems, and believe no one should assume that because a problem is hard, it’s unsolvable.

## Leadership Team

results.title: Elysium Health CA: Elysium Health - Science is Our Core Value
results.content:
> “The opportunity is the chance to make a difference by translating findings in the booming field of aging research directly to consumers today.”
 > “It's the brands that prioritize science-based products — like Elysium — that are setting a new standard for the industry.”
 > "Most impressively, the company’s co-founder is Leonard Guarente, who heads MIT’s aging center and is one of the pioneers of aging science, a contender for the Nobel Prize should geroscience ever get a nod from the Swedish academy.”
 > “Elysium collaborates with world-renowned international academic institutions to maintain the highest standards of practice, and their thought leadership is helping change the conversation in preventive health and wellness.”

## Science 101 [...] Format

results.title: Careers
results.content:
We’re looking for people who ascend above the status quo to do meaningful work that makes a tangible impact in the lives of others. If that's you, check out our cultural values, benefits, and open positions below.

### We work hard to make this a great place to spend our day.

We’re building a company of diverse, yet like-minded individuals who share not only a common value set, but also the desire to help advance scientific research. The work we do makes a meaningful difference in people’s lives and we feel a real sense of responsibility to succeed. So we push ourselves to do more, and better, every single day. 

### Meet the Elysium Health Team

Elysium’s co-founder and chief scientist, Dr. Leonard Guarente, is director of the Glenn Center for Biology of Aging Research at MIT. [...] ### Explore our Open Positions

Are you ready to help us solve the biggest challenges in health? Elysium is growing fast, and we’re actively recruiting across departments — scientists, engineers, marketers, designers, writers, and more.

Don't see an opportunity for you? Interested applicants are encouraged to email careers@elysiumhealth.com.

Elysium Health is an equal opportunity employer.

 ### Collaboration

  Working together we will create something meaningful and change the world (x+y).
 ### Respect

  We always treat our customers, our partners, and each other, with respect.
 ### Selflessness [...] The rest of the Elysium team comes from labs and hospitals, venture capital firms and investment banks, technology startups and award-winning magazines.

### Benefits and Perks

#### High quality health insurance

Pick between several medical, dental, and vision plans. All choices include healthcare support, on-demand primary care, and virtual support.

#### Flexible vacation

Hard work requires time off to rest and recharge. Elysium employees take vacation at their discretion (in consultation with their managers).

#### Professional development

Team members are granted $1,000 per year for continuing education expenses.

#### Wellness

Up to $100 reimbursed monthly for wellness-related costs (gym membership, yoga, etc.)

### Explore our Open Positions

results.title: About Our Company & Mission
results.content:
We founded Elysium because we believe everyone should have the benefit of direct access to this compelling research. Working in partnership with the world’s leading scientists and research institutions, Elysium is creating a new category in the health industry by translating advances in science into effective products we can easily incorporate into everyday life.

We believe this is an entirely new approach to health and wellness.

## Science, Our Core Value [...] Skip to content

## Your cart is empty

Continue shopping

### All Products

From the Lab to Your Door Promote optimal aging with Basis, support...

Go to All Products collection page
Shop All Products

 Register Index
 Help Center

Log inCart

Mission

# Elysium makes the benefits of aging research accessible to you.

Our mission is to translate critical scientific advancements in aging research into accessible health products and technologies.

Working directly with the world’s leading scientists, clinicians, and institutions, we develop clinically validated solutions that address some of the most significant needs in healthcare.

As an interdisciplinary group, we leverage a multi-factor approach to address the multi-factor problem of aging.

## Why Now? [...] So why did he start with yeast? Well, it turns out we share the same ancestor as yeast dating back about a billion years, and believe it or not, many really important genes (or very similar ones) found in yeast are also found in other organisms, including humans. They are “conserved” in evolutionary terms, which means they have universal functions in many or all species.

At Elysium Dr. Guarente works with his co-founders, Eric Marcotulli and Dan Alminana, and the Scientific Advisory Board, to aggressively pursue a research agenda focused on translating scientific findings into products people can access in the near term.

Elysium’s co-founder and chief scientist, Dr. Leonard Guarente, is the director of the Paul F. Glenn for Biology of Aging Research at MIT.

results.title: Cofactor – Advanced Collagen System with NAD+ Boost
results.content:
### How do subscriptions work?

Our prepaid subscription plans are our most cost-effective options. When you select a prepaid annual plan, the pricing offers savings to customers who commit to a long-term subscription. Prepaid subscriptions are considered final sale, so if you cancel in the middle of a prepaid plan, you will continue to receive the remaining pouches, and the cancellation will take effect at the end of your plan before renewal. Our monthly subscriptions are $62/month and can be canceled at any time prior to your next shipment. You can also place a single-purchase order by selecting “Individual Purchase” on the checkout page for $75. Please contact our Customer Experience Team at care@elysiumhealth.com if you need to talk about your plan.

### Where do you ship? [...] Couldn't load pickup availability

## Description

Youthful skin (plus, hair, nails, bones, and joints) requires collagen and NAD+. Unfortunately, both decline starting in our 20s. Cofactor by Elysium Health is an advanced 4-in-1 collagen system that combines: collagen peptides, nicotinamide riboside (NR), a precursor that’s clinically proven to boost NAD+, hyaluronic acid, and vitamin C.

 Collagen peptides (grass fed) to stimulate and provide the building blocks for collagen production\
 NAD+ booster NR to promote cellular youth for optimal collagen production\
 Hyaluronic Acid to improve skin elasticity, hydration, and barrier function\
 Vitamin C to support collagen production\
 Reduce fine lines and wrinkles\
 Bone, joint, hair, and nail support\

## Ingredients [...] Skip to content
